title: Magic, Medieval and Mythics
description: A realistic medieval themed modpack for fabric.
body:
A medieval minecraft modpack.Feel free to use this pack in content creation, but don't claim the pack as your own.
**I would recommend 3 GB of ram for this modpack**
# Notable Mods
- Farmer's Delight
- Medival Weapons
- Elemental Swords
- Yung's Structure Mods(I am not going to list them out)
- Comforts
- RPG Series mods(Not going to list them out)
- Tectonic
- Better Combat
- Backslot
- Towns and Towers
- Small Ships
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Gravestones
